department: Requirements for the Minor in Romance Languages
description: The Minor in Languages requires a minimum of 18 credits in two of the three Romance languages. 1000 level courses can be counted for only ONE of the languages. The student may enter the language sequence above the 1000 level by demonstrating his/her proficiency through testing, and permission of the instructor.

requirement_sections.heading: Note:
content: No more than 6 transfer credits from a non-FSU program will be accepted as credit towards the minor. Transferred credits must have received a minimum grade of 2.0. Students must maintain a 2.5 grade point average in courses towards the minor to remain in the program.
